Low Maintenance

January 19, 2022

Devices and software in my house that require almost no care and feeding:

  • Lutron Caseta light switches
  • Eero wireless access points
  • My new TV antenna
  • My long-term email provider, Fastmail

Devices in my house that require an excessive amount of care and feeding:

  • My Raspberry Pi running 9 different kinds of automation software
    • Especially homebridge plugins
  • The fountain in the back yard that grows mildew all summer no matter how much algae treatment I put in it
